data.title: Advanced Threat Detection
data.description: Google employs machine learning algorithms to proactively detect and mitigate threats.
data.technical_spec: Behavioral analysis to identify potential threats.

data.title: Zero Trust Security Model
data.description: Adopts a zero trust approach ensuring verification at every level.

data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: All user data is encrypted both in transit and at rest.

data.title: DDOS Protection
data.description: Capabilities to absorb and deflect distributed denial of service attacks.
data.technical_spec: Use of internal and external filtering layers.

data.title: Continuous Security Monitoring
data.description: Real-time monitoring of all activities across Google services.
data.technical_spec: Integration with security information and event management (SIEM) systems.
